title: pomaria rubicunda var. hauthalii
intro: Pomaria rubicunda var. hauthalii, also known as the Hauthal's bean trefoil, is a variety of the Pomaria rubicunda plant, a type of flowering plant in the Fabaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Hauthal's bean trefoil include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
